reviews.review_title: A new and exciting learning experience!
reviews.review_description: I love what they did here. Taking the education to the next level. Their events are always fun and engaging. Looking forward for the next ones. Giving the oculus a different approach other than entertainment and gaming. Having students from all over the world using their method makes you connect and learn from their different cultures. Congratulations to the keep going Vr team!! Felicidades Hámster!
This app is as cool as being in space. I have learned a lot here, much better than the green owl app. 💚
